mapper.select: SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS ORDER BY RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ

SELECT A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , A.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD , A.RATE_DIV_CD , ( SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID='GD0002' AND DTL_CD=A.RATE_ADSVC_DIV_CD) AS RATE_ADSVC_DIV_NM , A.RATE_ADSVC_NM , A.RATE_ADSVC_APD_NM , A.RATE_ADSVC_BAS_DESC , A.RATE_ADSVC_IMG_NM , A.MM_BAS_AMT_DESC , A.MM_BAS_AMT_VAT_DESC , A.PROMOTION_AMT_DESC , A.PROMOTION_AMT_VAT_DESC , A.GDNC_FILE_NM , A.USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , 'U' AS MOD_IU , A.CRET_IP , A.CRET_DT , A.CRET_ID , A.AMD_IP , A.AMD_DT , A.AMD_ID , STICKER_CTG , RATE_CTG FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS A WHERE A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq}

SELECT B.RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_SEQ , B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , B.RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID='CO0003' AND DTL_CD=B.RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD) AS RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_NM , B.SORT_ODRG , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_IMG_NM AS RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_IMG_CD , (SELECT IMG_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID='CO0012' AND DTL_CD=B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_IMG_NM) AS RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_IMG_NM , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_DESC , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_APD_DESC , B.USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS A LEFT JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_GDNC_DTL B ON A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(B.SORT_ODRG) ASC

SELECT T.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL_SEQ , T.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , T.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD , T.ITEM_SORT_KEY , T.SORT_ODRG , CASE WHEN RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD = 'RATE199' THEN T.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM WHEN RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD = 'ADDSV199' THEN T.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM ELSE T.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD_NM END RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM , T.FONT_STYLE_CD , T.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST , T.USE_YN , T.PSTNG_START_DATE , T.PSTNG_END_DATE , T.CRET_IP , T.CRET_DT , T.CRET_ID , T.AMD_IP , T.AMD_DT , T.AMD_ID FROM ( SELECT B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL_SEQ , B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD , B.ITEM_SORT_KEY , B.SORT_ODRG , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE (CD_GROUP_ID='CO0004' OR CD_GROUP_ID='CO0005') AND DTL_CD=B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD) AS RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_CD_NM , B.FONT_STYLE_CD , B.RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_SBST , B.USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , B.CRET_IP , B.CRET_DT , B.CRET_ID , B.AMD_IP , B.AMD_DT , B.AMD_ID FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS A LEFT JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_DTL B ON A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ) T ORDER BY T.SORT_ODRG ASC

SELECT B.RATE_ADSVC_LINK_SEQ , B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , B.LINK_CD , B.SORT_ODRG , B.LINK_NM , B.LINK_URL , B.USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , B.CRET_IP , B.CRET_DT , B.CRET_ID , B.AMD_IP , B.AMD_DT , B.AMD_ID FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_BAS A LEFT JOIN NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_LINK_DTL B ON A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ORDER BY B.SORT_ODRG ASC

SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , SORT_ODRG --정렬순서 , BANNER_SBST --배너테스트내용 , BANNER_COLOR --텍스트컬러코드 , BANNER_BACK_COLOR --배경컬러코드 FROM NMCP_RATE_GDNC_BANNER_DTL WHERE RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ORDER BY SORT_ODRG
SELECT RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , SORT_ODRG --정렬순서 , PROPERTY_CODE --속성코드 , PROPERTY_SBST --속성내용 FROM NMCP_RATE_GDNC_PROPERTY_DTL WHERE RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ORDER BY SORT_ODRG

SELECT /*RateAdd_Query.getRateGdncEffPriceList */ RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , JEHU_PRICE_REFLECT_CD --제휴혜택 코드 , USE_YN --노출여부 , CUSTOM_MONTHS --프로모션 개월 수 FROM NMCP_RATE_GDNC_EFF_PRICE_DTL WHERE RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq}
SELECT SEQ FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_VERSION WHERE STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND SEQ < ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_VERSION WHERE STATUS = 'SUCCESS' )
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_VERSION SET STATUS = 'EXPIRED' , EXPIRE_DT = SYSDATE , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ , VERSION , STATUS , MSG , EXPIRE_DT , DELETE_DT FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_VERSION WHERE STATUS = 'EXPIRED' AND EXPIRE_DT < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_VERSION SET STATUS = 'DELETED' , DELETE_DT = SYSDATE , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
